query: How do I make a claim for a GP visit?
ground_truth: Download the Laya App or log into Member Area to submit claims for everyday medical expenses including GP visits online 24/7.

query: Does my plan cover pre-authorisation for surgery?
ground_truth: Pre-authorisation is required for certain procedures. Members must contact Laya Healthcare before admission for planned inpatient treatment. Check your scheme rules and benefit table for specific requirements.

query: What are the GPline service hours?
ground_truth: GPline is available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

query: How do I add my newborn to my policy?
ground_truth: Contact Laya Healthcare to add a dependent to your policy. A newborn can typically be added within a specified period after birth without serving a waiting period. Refer to your scheme rules for exact timeframes.

query: Can I cancel my policy mid-year?
ground_truth: Members may cancel their policy by contacting Laya Healthcare. Refund eligibility depends on scheme rules and the reason for cancellation.

query: What mental health services are included in my plan?
ground_truth: Laya Healthcare provides mental wellbeing support including access to counselling and mental health consultations depending on your scheme.

query: What is the waiting period for orthopaedic surgery?
ground_truth: Waiting periods for orthopaedic surgery vary by scheme and whether the condition is pre-existing. Refer to your policy benefit table or scheme rules for exact waiting period details.

query: My claim was rejected — what can I do?
ground_truth: If your claim was rejected, you can appeal the decision by contacting Laya Healthcare. Provide your claim reference number and supporting medical documentation.
Laya Healthcare offers fertility benefit on selected schemes. Coverage for IVF depends on your specific plan. Check your scheme rules or benefit table for fertility benefit details.
